title: 私を支えるたくさんの

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I become aware of a Satono Diamond G1 victory
celebration in town.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I happen upon Satono Diamond and Kitasan
Black, and they inform me that the venue is
connected to the Satono Group.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In an effort to contribute, Satono Diamond says
she'll be passing out commemorative gifts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to go with her. Along the way, I learn
that every Satono Group location is holding a
party.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's very clear how much joy Satono Diamond's
victory has brought her family.
